title: Copying values/columns between boards
excerpt: We are creating two separate forms as part of our recruitment process. One for vacancy requests and one for onboarding new employees. We would like to automatically copy details of the job onto the onboarding board from …

posts.author: david24.change (David Fletcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are creating two separate forms as part of our recruitment process. One for vacancy requests and one for onboarding new employees. We would like to automatically copy details of the job onto the onboarding board from the vacancy request board, such as office base and salary. Is there a way to do this?

The idea is that once an item is created in vacancies, the item will be the job title and when an item is created in onboarding, the item will be the employees name. With some of the important information automatically copied between these boards without someone having to repeat these between forms. When I try to do this I get confused about what automation I should be using without creating a new idea as this will be done when someone completes the form?

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @david24.change this is possible using zzBots. With our Monday.com 1-Way sync you can specify which values you want synced, such as the your job details. With zzBots you have the power to create almost any custom sync.

Here is a link: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-mondaycom-1-way-sync

If you need help or have any questions, just chat with us on our website.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,
Another solution could be to setup an automation to achieve the desired result.
The automation would trigger when a new item is created in the vacancies board and would copy the relevant information to the onboarding board.
Hope this helps!
